side_effects.description: Swollen fingers, higher blood pressure, water retention in general at 4 IU dose, especially for 40+

protocol_notes: Views HGH as 'dirty drug' above 1-2 IU with unfavorable risk/benefit ratio at higher doses. Endorses low-dose HGH supplementation (1-2 IU) for athletes with dialed diet, recovery, training, and sleep. Expects side effects at 4 IU for those 40+.
